event_comments:
Ultimate Series standings will be posted Sunday 4/17.
Thank you to all our volunteers!
Notes for Reviewing Splits and Using RouteGadget for This Relay:
WinSplits: Of the options listed for comparing splits, the "Relay All #1 0" (Shows Loop A), "Relay All #2 0" (Shows Loops B), and "All, whole legs" (Compares loop times) are the most useful.
RouteGadget: Note that both Loop A and Loop B results are listed together in RouteGadget for this event. Loop A results are the first half of the list, and Loop B the second. You will find your name in the list twice (once for each loop), and can enter your routes and compare with others as usual within this context. When drawing your route, in the drop down menu "Select Course", select the blank space below "Select Course" in order to proceed with selecting your name.
Questions? Contact epunch@cascadeoc.org.
cumulative_event_comments:
Merged exact duplicate placeholder event 019b81f3-1f4d-7bbf-8540-6c02e0f30a08 ("Ultimate Series #5 (Relay)"). Reason: exact placeholder duplicate. Notes: Auto-reviewed exact placeholder duplicate cluster on identical name/date/venue.

Ultimate Series #4 (Sprint) – Shoreview Park
Thank you to all our volunteers!
WinSplits: Of the options listed for comparing splits, the “Relay All #1 0” (Shows Loop A), “Relay All #2 0” (Shows Loops B), and “All, whole legs” (Compares loop times) are the most useful.
RouteGadget: Note that both Loop A and Loop B results are listed together in RouteGadget for this event. Loop A results are the first half of the list, and Loop B the second. You will find your name in the list twice (once for each loop), and can enter your routes and compare with others as usual within this context. When drawing your route, in the drop down menu “Select Course”, select the blank space below “Select Course” in order to proceed with selecting your name.
TEAM RESULTS

The Ultimate Orienteer series is the sampler pack of orienteering: each event gives you the opportunity to try a different flavor!
The fifth event in the series is: THE RELAY!
The relay is a sprint in a team format, and cause for much cheering as teams hand off! Teams consist of two runners, each taking turns running both Leg A and Leg B. You may want a fast partner for team glory, or maybe a slower one so that you can rest more between legs! Whatever your team’s speed, the relay creates a sense of community for everyone.
Scoring for the Ultimate Orienteer Series
Each individual’s combined Leg A + Leg B will create their Ultimate score, so individual scoring will not be affected by your teammate.
Find a teammate
Check back later for special notes from the Course Designer.

The Ultimate Orienteer series is the sampler pack of orienteering: each event gives you the opportunity to try a different flavor!
The fifth event in the series is: THE RELAY!
The relay is a sprint in a team format, and cause for much cheering as teams hand off! Teams consist of two runners, each taking turns running both Leg A and Leg B. You may want a fast partner for team glory, or maybe a slower one so that you can rest more between legs! Whatever your team’s speed, the relay creates a sense of community for everyone.
Each individual’s combined Leg A + Leg B will create their Ultimate score, so individual scoring will not be affected by your teammate.
Need a teammate? Post a message to the Cascade Orienteering Facebook page, or send a message to the listserv, and meet someone new!
This will the second event of the day. Join us in the morning for the sprint!
Check back later for special notes from the Course Designer.
